typecheck.details: Success: no issues found in 42 source files

lint.details: All checks passed. Note: bare 'uv run ruff check .' fails with F811 in .git/replay-ast-push/ because pyproject.toml [tool.ruff] exclude overrides defaults (dropping .git). This is a pre-existing config issue, not introduced by this milestone.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add .git to the ruff exclude list in pyproject.toml, or switch to extend-exclude so defaults (including .git) are preserved. Currently [tool.ruff] exclude overrides defaults, causing ruff to scan .git/replay-ast-push/ worktrees and report false positives.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Running 'uv run ruff check .' fails with F811 in .git/replay-ast-push/tests/unit/test_cli_bootstrap.py. The workaround is 'uv run ruff check . --exclude .git' but this should be fixed in config.

rejectedObservations.observation: Worker couldn't execute .factory/init.sh on Windows - known issue documented in mission AGENTS.md.
services.yaml could document rg.zip auto-extraction behavior in benchmark_text command description.
rejectedObservations.reason: ambiguous - the auto-extraction is transparent and requires no manual setup; adding it to services.yaml would add noise since it's not a separate service or command.
